products.title: Smart Digital Kitchen Scale Pro
products.description: Precision digital scale with 0.1g accuracy, tempered glass surface, and smart app connectivity for nutritional tracking.

products.title: Electric Ceramic Spice Grinder
products.description: Rechargeable ceramic burr grinder with adjustable coarseness, perfect for spices, coffee, and herbs.

products.title: Smart Wireless Meat Thermometer
products.description: Bluetooth-enabled dual-probe thermometer with app alerts, preset temperatures, and 165ft range.

products.title: Adjustable Mandoline Slicer Deluxe
products.description: Professional-grade slicer with 18 thickness settings, julienne blade, and safety hand guard.

products.title: USB Rechargeable Milk Frother
products.description: Compact handheld frother with 3 speed settings, perfect for lattes, cappuccinos, and matcha.

products.title: Premium Silicone Utensil Set
products.description: Heat-resistant 8-piece set with acacia wood handles, includes holder. Safe for non-stick cookware.

products.title: Automatic Pot Stirrer
products.description: Hands-free stirring with 3 speed modes and adjustable arms. Perfect for sauces, soups, and risottos.

products.title: Walnut Magnetic Knife Strip
products.description: Powerful neodymium magnets in solid walnut wood. Holds up to 10 knives securely. Easy wall mount.

products.title: Smart Sensor Oil Dispenser
products.description: Automatic sensor pump with precise 15ml portions. Transparent glass body, USB rechargeable.

products.title: 4-in-1 Electric Vegetable Chopper
products.description: Multi-function chopper with 4 interchangeable blades for slicing, shredding, chopping, and mixing.

products.title: Precision Stainless Measuring Spoons
products.description: 5-piece nested set with engraved measurements. 18/8 stainless steel, dishwasher safe.

products.title: Portable Electric Citrus Juicer
products.description: Compact dome juicer with automatic reverse function. Works with oranges, lemons, and limes.
